textByHash.1790ee1eab0c7888312fed471d15a34ab4b51ce5: Hand me the banknotes you wish me to exchange.
textByHash.8279895d5bff5ef2c5aaa18d60031a9c6b203bc0: Hello. Do you wish me to exchange banknotes for you? I charge only 5 coins for each banknote.
textByHash.a4475aa5ba2ab361447c7d8765687b55efa5dee4: I exchange banknotes for real items. That's not a banknote.
textByHash.b3bc07723f62369c9c2dc6381fb11518e5bf5ae2: I charge 5 coins for exchanging each banknote.
textByHash.e7964731e0e335eae045df78ea669ba6f4bd5c29: I am Aisles. I can exchange banknotes for real items. Do you want any banknotes converted?
